"[5] ^TRAFFIC ADVISORY ISSUED IN HAWTHORNE: EB AND WB LANES OF EL SEGUNDO BLVD BETWEEN BIRCH AVE AND HAWTHORNE BLVD WILL BE CLOSED UNTIL FURTHER NOTICE DUE TO A TRAFFIC COLLISION. REF HAWTORNE POLICE DEPARTMENT INCIDENT 26-2120. "
"[3] ^WIND ADVISORY CONTINUED THROUGHOUT THE NEWHALL AREA: I-5 FROM CALGROVE TO FORT TEJON. STRONG WINDS, HIGH PROFILE VEHICLES, CAMPERS, TRAILERS USE CAUTION - REF LOG: 0822"
"[2] ^SIGALERT UPDATE IN LEBEC: NB I-5, SOUTH OF SMOKEY ROAD. THE #1 AND #2 LANES ARE NOW OPEN. THE #3 AND #4 LANES WILL REMAIN BLOCKED UNTIL FURTHER NOTICE DUE TO A TRAFFIC HAZARD. REF LOG: 2261 "
